mapper.select: SELECT sp.*, d.dept_name as department_name FROM schedule_plan sp LEFT JOIN department d ON sp.department_id = d.id WHERE sp.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sp.created_time DESC
SELECT sp.*, d.dept_name as department_name FROM schedule_plan sp LEFT JOIN department d ON sp.department_id = d.id WHERE sp.id = #{id} AND sp.delmark = 0

SELECT sp.*, d.dept_name as department_name FROM schedule_plan sp LEFT JOIN department d ON sp.department_id = d.id WHERE sp.department_id = #{departmentId} AND sp.plan_month = #{planMonth} AND sp.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sp.created_time DESC
SELECT sp.*, d.dept_name as department_name FROM schedule_plan sp LEFT JOIN department d ON sp.department_id = d.id WHERE sp.status = #{status} AND sp.delmark = 0 ORDER BY sp.created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_plan ( plan_name, department_id, plan_month, status, ai_generated, ai_version, total_schedules, total_quota, created_by, delmark ) VALUES ( #{planName}, #{departmentId}, #{planMonth}, #{status}, #{aiGenerated}, #{aiVersion}, #{totalSchedules}, #{totalQuota}, #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_plan SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE schedule_plan SET published_time = #{publishedTime}, published_by = #{publishedBy}, status = '已发布' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE schedule_plan SET delmark = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
